sourceMovie.title: Strange Darling
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: People revisit Strange Darling for the same reason it broke through in 2024: clear stakes, memorable faces, and a thriller rhythm that doesn't stall in the middle. JT Mollner keeps the ensemble pointed in one direction. The horror and thriller blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: The Last House on the Left
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Strange Darling clicked for you, The Last House on the Left (2009) is a strong next stop: both trade in horror and thriller, with unease that lingers after the credits. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Strange Darling?
faq.answer: Try The Last House on the Left, MaXXXine, Dressed to Kill—each shares DNA with Strange Darling while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Strange Darling?
faq.answer: Strange Darling (2024) is best described as Horror, Thriller. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Strange Darling worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.9/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this horror lane.
